items.summary: In the backend (backend/main.mo), register the Internet Identity principal associated with the email sairamdevil2515@gmail.com as a pre-seeded admin user with full admin privileges. Since Internet Identity does not expose email addresses directly, add a backend function `addAdminByPrincipal(principal: Principal)` callable only by the owner role, and pre-seed a known admin entry for this user. Also expose a function `grantAdminRole(principal: Principal)` that allows an owner to elevate any authenticated principal to admin role. Ensure this new admin can perform all admin-privileged operations: add scores, delete scores, and access the admin dashboard.

In the Admin Dashboard (frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx), add a 'Manage Admins' section visible only to owner-role users. This section should display a form with a text input for a principal ID and a 'Grant Admin Role' button that calls the backend `grantAdminRole` function. Show a success or error message after the operation. Include a helper note in the UI explaining that the principal ID must be obtained from the user's Internet Identity login session.
